announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide Cloud is Live
announcements.body: Offload the heavy lifting of production AI with **RocketRide Cloud**: shared pipelines, no-hassle infra, and a fraction of the cost on our patent-pending model server. Sign up to start building.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide Cloud Starter Plan: $5/mo
announcements.body: The new **Starter plan** puts RocketRide Cloud at **$5/month** with 500 tokens included, then $0.03/token as you scale. Design in VS Code, hit deploy, and run your pipeline on a live, API-callable endpoint.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) 5,000 Stars and 10,000 Downloads
announcements.body: RocketRide just crossed **5,000 GitHub stars** and **10,000 downloads**, thanks to everyone building with us. Star the repo and come build something.

announcements.title: ![Discord](assets/discord.svg) Join our Discord
announcements.body: Connect with the RocketRide team and builders on **Discord**.

announcements.title: ![Hackathon](assets/trophy.svg) HackwithSeattle 2.0
announcements.body: 8-hour hackathon at the **AWS Skill Center, Seattle** on July 17, 2026. Hack, get mentorship, and demo your project to industry leaders.

announcements.title: ![Hackathon](assets/trophy.svg) Agents You Love 2.0 - SF
announcements.body: 8-hour hackathon to **build AI agents people actually want to use** in **San Francisco** on July 28, 2026. RocketRide × HydraDB.

announcements.title: ![Hackathon](assets/trophy.svg) Memory Meets Motion - SF
announcements.body: 8-hour hackathon on **long-term AI memory and autonomous agents** in **San Francisco** on July 30, 2026. RocketRide × FalkorDB.

announcements.title: ![Hackathon](assets/trophy.svg) Build Fast. Launch Loud. - Palo Alto
announcements.body: One-day **Prompt Driven Development** hackathon at **Venture Dock, Palo Alto** on July 25, 2026. Co-sponsored by RocketRide.

announcements.title: ![Listen](assets/mic.svg) Podcast: The IDE as AI Command Center
announcements.body: **Joe Maionchi** on why your IDE is the new command center for building AI. Watch the episode.

announcements.title: ![Listen](assets/mic.svg) Podcast: AI Is Fast, Projects Are Slow
announcements.body: On the **MLOps Community** podcast: why AI projects stall in production and how RocketRide closes the gap. Watch now.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: Compare LLMs Side by Side
announcements.body: Watch **Josh** compare multiple LLMs in a single RocketRide pipeline, in real time. See the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Community Demo: FitCheck
announcements.body: See **FitCheck**, a community-built app running on RocketRide, in action. Watch the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Community Demo: PathFinder
announcements.body: **PathFinder**, a community-built RocketRide × **Neo4j** app, maps your skills from your current role to an AI-native target with a realistic timeline. Watch the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: Real-Time LLM Comparison
announcements.body: Route one prompt to **Claude, GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro, and Grok** side by side in a real-time RocketRide comparison pipeline. Watch the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: Meeting Recap That Writes Itself
announcements.body: A no-code RocketRide agent turns a meeting transcript into an executive summary and follow-up email in under 3 minutes. Watch the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: Multilingual Match Highlights
announcements.body: **Charlie Gillet** turns match-commentary clips in any language into clean English highlights on RocketRide Cloud. Watch the build.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: AI Support Bot From Your Docs
announcements.body: **Mithilesh** builds a RAG support bot on RocketRide Cloud that answers from your own docs and ships to a live, shareable endpoint. Watch the build.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide OSS v1.3.0
announcements.body: The **v1.3.0** release adds scheduled pipeline deployments, a faster vision suite, and new nodes for DeepL, Daytona, FalkorDB, Mem0, and more. Update the VS Code extension to get it.
